measurements.claim: The wind-down synthesis and master plan documents exist and are linked from README.md.
The research corpus inventory records at least 150 pass ledgers, 163 packets, 445 schema artifacts, 147 Crucible run records, and 26 Gather source stores.
Pass 0151 records the final frontier-problem source federation with 83 candidate sources, 24 Gather-verified captures, 12 problem lanes, and 8 admission gates.
The master plan covers Gather, Index, Forum, Crucible, Telos, Learn, BuildLang/buildc, and Emet as named pillars.
evidence: Project Telos Master Plan includes System Pillars sections for all required names

measurements.claim: The wind-down deliverables preserve boundaries: they do not claim current proof of new laws of physics, clinical efficacy, or raw-scale frontier model superiority.
evidence: wind-down synthesis has explicit low-confidence/fenced claims
master plan says not to compete only on raw pretraining scale first

measurements.claim: The run corpus manifest records 150 pass-ledger rows through pass 0151.
